UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile within EidSpark, including their gamification progress and personal details.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

avatarUrl.description: URL to the user's profile avatar image.

totalPoints.description: The total points accumulated by the user across all activities.

levelId.description: Reference to the current Level achieved by the user. (Relationship: Level 1:N UserProfile)

earnedBadgeIds.description: References to Badges earned by the user. (Relationship: Badge N:N UserProfile)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was last updated.

Level.title: Level
Level.description: Defines the different progression levels within the EidSpark Rewards gamification system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Level entity.

name.description: The name of the level (e.g., 'Eid Visitor', 'Eid Legend').

description.description: A brief description of the level.

minPoints.description: The minimum number of points required to reach this level.

iconUrl.description: URL to an icon representing this level.

Badge.title: Badge
Badge.description: Defines the different badges that users can earn by achieving specific milestones.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Badge entity.

name.description: The name of the badge (e.g., 'Eid Starter', 'Social Star').

description.description: A description of the badge and the criteria to earn it.

iconUrl.description: URL to an icon representing this badge.

DailyChallenge.title: DailyChallenge
DailyChallenge.description: Defines a recurring daily challenge that users can complete for additional points.

id.description: Unique identifier for the DailyChallenge entity.

name.description: The name of the daily challenge (e.g., 'Generate 3 excuses today').

description.description: A detailed description of the challenge objective.

actionType.description: A string identifier for the type of user action required to complete the challenge (e.g., 'GenerateExcuse', 'UploadEidSelfie').

targetCount.description: The number of times the 'actionType' must be performed to complete the challenge.

pointsReward.description: The number of points awarded upon successful completion of the challenge.

UserChallengeProgress.title: UserChallengeProgress
UserChallengeProgress.description: Tracks a specific user's progress and completion for a particular daily challenge on a given day.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserChallengeProgress entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who is attempting the challenge. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N UserChallengeProgress)

challengeId.description: Reference to the DailyChallenge being tracked. (Relationship: DailyChallenge 1:N UserChallengeProgress)

date.description: The specific date (YYYY-MM-DD) for which this challenge progress is recorded, indicating a daily reset.

currentCount.description: The current count of actions performed by the user towards completing the challenge for the specified date.

isCompleted.description: Indicates whether the user has successfully completed the challenge for the specified date.

completedAt.description: Timestamp when the user completed the challenge, if applicable.

SalamiEntry.title: SalamiEntry
SalamiEntry.description: Records individual 'salami' (gift money) entries received by a user, part of the Salami Tracker feature.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SalamiEntry entity.

trackerUserId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who is tracking this salami entry. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N SalamiEntry)

giverName.description: The name of the person who gave the salami.

receivedDate.description: The date when the salami was received.

notes.description: Optional notes or comments about the salami entry.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the salami entry was recorded.

EidGreeting.title: EidGreeting
EidGreeting.description: Stores details about a personalized Eid greeting generated by a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the EidGreeting entity.

creatorUserId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who created this greeting. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N EidGreeting)

recipientName.description: The name of the person the Eid greeting is for.

templateId.description: Identifier for the chosen greeting template.

generatedImageUrl.description: URL to the generated Eid greeting image.

shareUrl.description: A unique URL for sharing the generated Eid greeting.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the Eid greeting was generated.

Mosque.title: Mosque
Mosque.description: Stores information about a mosque, used by the Mosque Finder feature.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Mosque entity.

name.description: The official name of the mosque.

address.description: The full street address of the mosque.

latitude.description: The geographical latitude coordinate of the mosque.

longitude.description: The geographical longitude coordinate of the mosque.

phoneNumber.description: Contact phone number for the mosque.

websiteUrl.description: Official website URL for the mosque.

imageUrl.description: URL to an image of the mosque.

description.description: A brief description or details about the mosque.

UserMosqueContribution.title: UserMosqueContribution
UserMosqueContribution.description: Records user-contributed information about mosques, such as Eid Jamaat times, which can earn points.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserMosqueContribution entity.

contributorUserId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who contributed this information. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N UserMosqueContribution)

mosqueId.description: Reference to the Mosque entity if the contribution is for an existing mosque. (Relationship: Mosque 1:N UserMosqueContribution)

mosqueName.description: The name of the mosque, especially if it's a new or unlisted mosque.

mosqueAddress.description: The address of the mosque, particularly useful for new entries.

jamaatTime.description: The specific prayer time being contributed (e.g., 'Fajr 5:30 AM', 'Eid Prayer 8:00 AM').

type.description: The type of prayer time being contributed (e.g., 'EidPrayer', 'DailyPrayer').

verificationStatus.description: The current verification status of the contribution (e.g., 'Pending', 'Approved', 'Rejected').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the mosque contribution was made.

ZakatCalculationRecord.title: ZakatCalculationRecord
ZakatCalculationRecord.description: Stores a historical record of a user's Zakat calculations.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ZakatCalculationRecord entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who performed the calculation. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N ZakatCalculationRecord)

cashValue.description: The cash amount input by the user for calculation.

goldValue.description: The gold value input by the user for calculation.

savingsValue.description: The savings amount input by the user for calculation.

businessAssetsValue.description: The business assets value input by the user for calculation.

calculatedZakatAmount.description: The final Zakat amount calculated based on the inputs.

calculationDate.description: Timestamp when the Zakat calculation was performed.

SavedExcuse.title: SavedExcuse
SavedExcuse.description: A funny Eid Salami excuse saved by the user.

EidSelfie.title: EidSelfie
EidSelfie.description: A selfie submitted to the Eid contest.

SalamiCard.title: SalamiCard
SalamiCard.description: A digital Eidi envelope shared between users.

definition.description: Stores a user's profile and gamification progress.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

definition.description: Records individual 'salami' entries received by a user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns these salami entries.

params.name: salamiEntryId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific salami entry.

definition.description: Stores details about a personalized Eid greeting generated by a user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: greetingId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific Eid greeting.
